2026-05.executive_summary: This is Valoriza Australia's first monthly health assessment. The site is live, stable, and fully available — with strong security and backup posture on WP Engine. However, mobile page speed needs attention. Google's lab test records an 8.3 second Largest Contentful Paint, which is well above the 2.5 second threshold and will impact search rankings for key service pages. The root cause is a combination of render-blocking CSS, an unoptimised hero image, and unused JavaScript. Addressing these is the priority for the next maintenance cycle.
highlights: Site live and fully available — 100% uptime recorded
WordPress, plugins and theme confirmed running on WP Engine
Daily automated backups active and healthy
WAF (Web Application Firewall) active — no threats detected
CLS score of 0 — no layout instability at all
key_risks: LCP of 8.3s in Google lab test — well above the 2.5s threshold (RED)
6 render-blocking CSS/JS requests delaying first paint
Hero image not preloaded — causing delayed LCP discovery
Unused JavaScript and CSS adding unnecessary page weight

performance.headline: Hero image and render-blocking assets are slowing mobile load
performance.interpretation: Valoriza scores 68/100 on Google's mobile performance test (PageSpeed Insights lab data, run 7 May 2026). The critical issue is Largest Contentful Paint of 8.3 seconds — Google's threshold for a good LCP is 2.5 seconds. The cause is a combination of 6 render-blocking CSS/JS requests that delay the browser from rendering anything, and a large hero image that is not preloaded or properly optimised. Real-user field data shows better numbers (LCP 1.3s), but Google's ranking algorithm uses lab scores, so the 68/100 represents the ranking risk.

metrics.label: PageSpeed (Mobile)
metrics.description: Amber — below the 80 target but not critical

metrics.label: Largest Contentful Paint
metrics.description: Well above the 2.5s good threshold — main ranking risk

metrics.label: Total Blocking Time
metrics.description: Within the 200ms good threshold — interactivity is fine

metrics.label: Cumulative Layout Shift
metrics.description: Perfect — no layout shift at all

metrics.label: Speed Index
metrics.description: Page takes a while to appear visually complete

performance.risk: An LCP of 8.3s is a direct Google ranking signal. Service and contact pages competing for organic search traffic will be penalised relative to faster competitors. The fix is targeted and achievable in a single sprint.
performance.recommended_action: Preload the hero image using <link rel=preload>, convert it to WebP format, and defer the 6 render-blocking CSS/JS files. Expected outcome: LCP under 3s, PageSpeed score 80+.

security.headline: WAF active — plugin audit recommended this cycle
security.interpretation: The WP Engine WAF is active and blocking threats at the edge. No malware or suspicious logins detected. As this is the first assessment, a full plugin audit is recommended to establish a clean security baseline and confirm no outdated or abandoned plugins are installed.

metrics.label: WAF Status
metrics.description: Firewall blocking threats at the edge

metrics.label: Malware Scan
metrics.description: No malware or suspicious files detected

security.risk: No active security threat. Establishing a plugin audit baseline this cycle ensures any abandoned or vulnerable plugins are identified before they become an issue.
security.recommended_action: Complete a full plugin audit this cycle — review all installed plugins for activity, update status, and known CVEs.

reliability.headline: Site fully available — no downtime recorded
reliability.interpretation: The site is running on WP Engine infrastructure with 100% uptime recorded this period. No incidents, outages, or degraded-performance events were detected.
reliability.risk: No reliability risk at this time.

updates.headline: Plugin update review required this cycle
updates.interpretation: This is the first maintenance cycle for Valoriza. A full review of plugin and theme update status is underway. Any pending updates will be applied and tested in this cycle to bring the site to a fully current baseline.

metrics.label: PHP Version
metrics.description: PHP version to be confirmed this cycle

updates.risk: Pending plugin updates can expose the site to known vulnerabilities. Completing the first-cycle update baseline removes this risk.
updates.recommended_action: Apply all pending plugin and theme updates in this maintenance window. Confirm PHP version is 8.1 or higher.

backups.headline: Automated daily backups confirmed healthy
backups.interpretation: WP Engine automated daily backups are active and completing successfully. Restore points are available covering the last 30 days.

metrics.label: Last Backup
metrics.description: Most recent backup completed without error

metrics.label: Retention
metrics.description: Full month of restore points available

backups.risk: No backup risk. Daily automated backups ensure full recoverability.

engineering.headline: Clean baseline — onboarding deployment successful
engineering.interpretation: Valoriza has been onboarded to the Wordie maintenance programme this month. The initial baseline deployment was completed without incident.
engineering.risk: No engineering risk at this time.

recommended_actions.title: Preload hero image and convert to WebP format
recommended_actions.impact: The hero image is the LCP element — preloading it and serving it in WebP format is the single highest-impact change. Expected LCP improvement from 8.3s to under 3s, lifting PageSpeed score to 80+. This directly affects Google rankings for Valoriza's service pages.

recommended_actions.title: Defer 6 render-blocking CSS and JavaScript requests
recommended_actions.impact: Render-blocking resources are preventing the browser from displaying any content until they finish loading. Deferring non-critical JS and inlining critical CSS will reduce First Contentful Paint and Speed Index significantly.

recommended_actions.title: Apply all pending plugin and theme updates
recommended_actions.impact: Establishing a clean update baseline in the first maintenance cycle removes known vulnerability exposure and ensures compatibility with the latest WordPress core.

recommended_actions.title: Remove unused JavaScript and CSS
recommended_actions.impact: Google flags unused JS and CSS as contributing to unnecessary page weight. Removing or conditionally loading these assets will reduce overall load time and improve the PageSpeed score.

tickets.subject: Valoriza onboarding — site access and WP Engine setup
tickets.notes: WP Engine access confirmed. Baseline health snapshot completed.

tickets.subject: Performance remediation — hero image LCP fix
tickets.notes: Hero image preload and WebP conversion scoped. Work commencing next sprint.
